name: static-first-blog-engine
description: A static-first Markdown blog engine with themes, plugins, and an optional file-backed admin panel.
author: kizu (伊甸黎明)

scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:packages && node packages/cli/dist/index.js dev
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:packages && node packages/cli/dist/index.js preview
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:packages && node packages/cli/dist/index.js deploy
